meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve stuck with basic apps (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity Template to Scale SaaS Apps
content.seo_description: Stop building basic apps. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to deliver professional, production-ready SaaS solutions at 10x the speed.
content.answer_block: Stop wasting cycles on boilerplate. The Antigravity project template provides a production-hardened foundation, while Claude Code automates the implementation of complex features. By combining these, you shift from manual coding to architectural orchestration, allowing you to deliver high-end SaaS applications in days rather than weeks.
content.intro:
You’ve been there: staring at a blank IDE, burning billable hours on authentication flows, database schemas, and folder structures. The client wants a scalable SaaS, but you’re stuck in the weeds of basic CRUD apps that feel more like student projects than professional products. The gap between a hobbyist script and a high-ticket deliverable isn't just effort—it's infrastructure.

It’s time to break orbit. The Antigravity project template is the industry-standard scaffold designed for rapid deployment, abstracting away the noise so you can focus on the core business logic. When paired with Claude Code, you don't just write code; you command an AI engineer to manifest your architecture in real-time, giving you the leverage of a senior dev team in a single terminal window.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the base architecture to ensure type-safety and modularity from the first line of code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity enterprise template with Next.js 14, Drizzle ORM, and Tailwind CSS.

steps.title: Define Domain Entities
steps.description: Configure the database schema to handle complex relationships without manual boilerplate.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Drizzle schema for a multi-tenant SaaS application including users, workspaces, and subscription tiers.
steps.claude_code_command: claude add schema --entity workspace --fields 'name:text, ownerId:uuid, plan:enum'

steps.title: Implement Authentication Logic
steps.description: Secure the application using industry-standard patterns built into the template.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure NextAuth.js with GitHub and Google providers using the Antigravity security middleware pattern.

steps.title: Automate API Route Generation
steps.description: Create scalable API endpoints that follow RESTful conventions automatically.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate CRUD API routes for the workspace entity with Zod validation and error handling.

steps.title: Execute Production Build
steps.description: Run the final verification to ensure the code meets production standards before deployment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a final linting, type-check, and build optimization for the Antigravity production config.

pro_tips: Always use the '--dry-run' flag in Claude Code to audit the generated file changes before committing to your repo.
Leverage the Antigravity 'shared' folder for utility functions to keep your business logic clean and DRY.
Create a custom '.claude-instructions' file in your project root to force the AI to follow your specific coding style guide.
Use Antigravity's built-in hooks for real-time telemetry to impress clients with performance dashboards.
Pipeline your deployment by hooking the Claude Code 'build-check' output directly into your GitHub Actions workflow.
content.next_steps: Deploy your first MVP to Vercel and present the prototype to your client. Use the time saved to focus on UX design and marketing strategy.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting the boilerplate and start shipping like a senior engineer. You have the tools, the template, and the roadmap. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
